name: Amortização de Empréstimo
description: Calcule a parcela mensal e os juros totais de um empréstimo.
seo_title: Amortização de Empréstimo – Passo a Passo
seo_description: Calcule a parcela mensal e os juros totais de um empréstimo. Calculadora gratuita, precisa e instantânea. Calculadora facil de usar com detalhamento da.
example_label: Calculating monthly payment for $250,000 mortgage at 4.5% over 30 years.
result_context: The payment of {payment} is your monthly mortgage payment. The total_interest of {total_interest} is paid over the loan life.
mistakes: Not accounting for property taxes and insurance in total payment
Paying only minimum without considering extra principal payments
Refinancing without calculating break-even point on closing costs
